label: CU loop • flip two switches, leave a third untouched
query: Turn on Airplane Mode and turn on Bluetooth. Leave Wi-Fi exactly as it is.
notes: Multi-action precision: two switches must end ON while Wi-Fi (already on) must never be clicked. failIfClicked on Wi-Fi catches an over-eager or mis-targeted toggle, and the value predicates pin the final world state. Live discriminator (no scriptedActions); tiny-context models SKIP.
